name: canshare-tnm8-neuroendocrine-gi-cm
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) neuroendocrine gastrointestinal clinical M category
description: A clinical distant metastasis stage (cM) of a neuroendocrine gastrointestinal tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
